'''''Boash'ua''''' was a [[EF76 Nebulon-B escort frigate/Legends|EF76 Nebulon-B escort frigate]] captained by the [[Bothan/Legends|Bothan]] [[Kursk Mal'ia]] during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]]. It most famously took place in the [[Battle of Kathol System]], in which it assisted in the defeat of [[Moff/Legends|Moff]] [[Kentor Sarne]] and the liberation of [[Kathol (planet)|Kathol]]. The ''Boash'ua'' served as [[Captain/Legends|Captain]] [[Kursk Mal'ia]]'s [[Flagship/Legends|flagship]].

{{Ship-stub}}
